channel.title: CyberNetSec - Cyberattack
channel.description: Latest cyberattack threat intelligence - the last 10 articles

item.title: LogiTrans Global Paralyzed by $45M QuantumLock Ransomware Attack, Global Supply Chains Disrupted
item.description:
Global logistics firm LogiTrans Global has been hit by a devastating ransomware attack attributed to a new group named QuantumLock. The attack, which began on June 30, 2026, has encrypted critical systems, causing a worldwide halt in operations, including shipment tracking and fleet management. The ...

Severity: Critical

Categories: Ransomware, Cyberattack, Supply Chain Attack

Read Full Article →

item.title: Actively Exploited 'ShiftScribe' Zero-Day in Apex-Office Suite Puts Millions at Risk
item.description:
A critical remote code execution (RCE) zero-day vulnerability, named 'ShiftScribe' and tracked as CVE-2026-35801, has been discovered in the popular Apex-Office Suite, affecting over 100 million users. The flaw, with a CVSS score of 9.6, is being actively exploited by the state-sponsored threat acto...

Severity: Critical

Categories: Vulnerability, Threat Actor, Cyberattack

Read Full Article →

item.title: Microsoft Releases Emergency Patch for Actively Exploited Exchange Server RCE Flaw (CVE-2026-17747)
item.description:
Microsoft has released an emergency, out-of-band security update for a critical remote code execution (RCE) vulnerability in Microsoft Exchange Server 2016 and 2019. Tracked as CVE-2026-17747 with a CVSS score of 9.8, the flaw allows an unauthenticated attacker to gain code execution by sending a sp...

Severity: Critical

Categories: Vulnerability, Patch Management, Cyberattack

Read Full Article →

item.title: DataHaven Cloud Storage Outage Caused by Security Breach Targeting Customer Data
item.description:
Enterprise cloud storage provider DataHaven has confirmed that a multi-hour global outage on June 30, 2026, was the result of a security breach. Attackers gained access to an internal Kubernetes cluster via a zero-day vulnerability in a proprietary management API. They then attempted to issue comman...

Severity: High

Categories: Cloud Security, Cyberattack, Incident Response

Read Full Article →

item.title: SimpleHelp RMM Flaw Actively Exploited to Deploy Novel Djinn Stealer
item.description:
A critical authentication bypass vulnerability, CVE-2026-48558, in SimpleHelp remote support software is being actively exploited to gain administrative access to servers. Attackers are leveraging this 10.0 CVSS flaw to deploy a new, cross-platform information stealer called Djinn Stealer via a load...

Severity: Critical

Categories: Vulnerability, Malware, Cyberattack

Read Full Article →

item.title: Russian APT Gamaredon Enhances Malware and Evasion Techniques in Ukraine War
item.description:
The Russian APT group Gamaredon has continued to evolve its malware arsenal and evasion tactics in its relentless cyber campaign against Ukraine. Recent analysis shows the group is increasingly using legitimate cloud services like Cloudflare for C2, collaborating with other Russian APTs like Turla, ...

Severity: High

Categories: Threat Actor, Cyberattack, Malware

Read Full Article →

item.title: AssuranceAmerica Data Breach Impacts Over 1.1 Million, Exposing SSNs and Driver's Licenses
item.description:
AssuranceAmerica Managing General Agency, LLC has disclosed a major data breach affecting over 1.1 million individuals. The incident, which occurred in March 2026, stemmed from a targeted attack on an employee. The unauthorized access led to the theft of a vast amount of sensitive policyholder data,...

Severity: High

Categories: Data Breach, Phishing, Cyberattack

Read Full Article →

item.title: Attackers Actively Exploit Critical Cisco Unified CM Flaw to Deploy Webshells
item.description:
A critical Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability in Cisco Unified Communications Manager (Unified CM), tracked as CVE-2026-20230, is being actively exploited in the wild. Attackers are leveraging the flaw, which carries an 8.6 CVSS score, to write arbitrary files to the underlying OS, inc...

Severity: High

Categories: Vulnerability, Cyberattack, Threat Intelligence

Read Full Article →

item.title: Polymarket Hit by $3.1M Supply Chain Attack; Malicious JavaScript Siphons User Funds
item.description:
The cryptocurrency prediction platform Polymarket has confirmed a loss of approximately $3.1 million due to a frontend supply chain attack. First reported on June 26, 2026, the incident occurred when attackers compromised an unnamed third-party software dependency and injected malicious JavaScript i...

Severity: High

Categories: Supply Chain Attack, Cyberattack, Data Breach

Read Full Article →

item.title: Over 200,000 Scam Sites Powered by Legitimate Chinese DCloud Framework, Infoblox Reports
item.description:
Cybersecurity firm Infoblox has uncovered a massive network of over 200,000 fraudulent websites being powered by a legitimate Chinese open-source framework called DCloud Uni-App. Threat actors are creating and selling scam templates built with the toolkit, enabling a wide array of investment scams, ...

Severity: High

Categories: Phishing, Cyberattack, Threat Intelligence

Read Full Article →
